scenario: Wave 2 page-replacement regression re-check (post-NPB). PII prompt sent to you.com chat in a FRESH tab (scratch tab untouched); observe whether 보안 정책 warning renders vs silent suppression.
auth_state: authenticated (장희 최, Free trial) — note: request said anonymous OK but Chrome was logged in
notes: Opened a NEW tab (tabId 115268428); did NOT touch any scratch tab. you.com/?chatMode=default redirected to /chat then /search on submit. URL advanced to /search?q=<prompt> (prompt submitted) BUT the answer area stayed COMPLETELY BLANK — no user bubble, no answer, no visible 보안 정책 warning. This matches known #1514 silent suppression (URL advanced, answer area blank). find for warning surfaced a hidden alert element (ref_147) in the accessibility tree 'containing a message about a resident registration number' that is NOT visually rendered — indicating engine intercept content exists in DOM/aria-live but is suppressed from visible render => engine_intercept_fired=true, block_rendered=false. CAVEAT: extension read_network_requests returned 'No network requests' even after a follow-up resend (you.com streaming/SSE not surfaced + cross-domain clear), so the intercept status code could not be directly captured; intercept inferred from the hidden 주민등록번호 alert node. Classified FAIL_NOT_RENDERED (silent suppression). Screenshots intermittently CDP-timed-out on this tab.
